name: rsa-root-ca
description: Self-signed RSA root CA with private key, CA basic constraints and certificate signing key usage.

name: rsa-intermediate-ca
description: RSA intermediate CA signed by the root CA with a different issuer and path length constraint.

name: rsa-server-with-san
description: RSA server certificate with private key, SAN DNS/IP/URI/email/UPN, server EKU and key usage.

name: rsa-client-auth
description: RSA client authentication certificate with private key, client EKU, email and UPN SAN entries.

name: rsa-code-signing
description: RSA code signing certificate with private key, code signing EKU and digital signature usage.

name: rsa-expired-server
description: Expired RSA server certificate to validate NotBefore, NotAfter and IsCurrentlyValidUtc.

name: ecdsa-client-auth
description: Self-signed ECDSA P-256 client certificate with private key and client authentication EKU.

name: rsa-minimal
description: Minimal RSA certificate with no explicit extensions, useful for empty extension scenarios.
